label: FEEDBACK BODY BG WHITE
detail: iframe body bg=pure white. Density tokens load but body bg rule not applying. Root cause: dialog pages use .t-Dialog-page body class, not .t-PageBody — density-apex-overrides.css body selector doesn't cover .t-Dialog-page. Fix: add '.t-Dialog-page { background-color: var(--ds-color-surface-page) !important; }' to density-apex-overrides.css

label: FEEDBACK IFRAME BODY CLASS
detail: t-Dialog-page t-Dialog-page--standard t-PageTemplate--dialog apex-side-nav apex-icons-fontapex apex-

label: FEEDBACK PAGE TYPE
detail: Dialog page (.t-Dialog-page) — NOT .t-PageBody. This is why the body bg override misses.

label: FEEDBACK DARK MODE
detail: ds-dark not in iframe — dark mode JS runs in parent frame only. density-dark-mode.js needs to run inside dialog iframes too, or the dark class needs to be applied to the iframe body on toggle.
